LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF FLEXGROUND, LLC'S AMENDED APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF FLEXGROUND, LLC'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING REFILED WITH PROPER NOTICE. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN THAT IT SERVED OBS WITH THE AMENDED NOTICE OF HEARING NOR HAS 30 DAYS ELAPSED SINCE THE MARCH 18, 2026 SERVICE OF THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2026 Continued To Sep-02-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Amended APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Apr-14-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF FLEXGROUND, LLC'S AMENDED APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER

Appearances via Zoom:
Alexander Kessler of Grant Kessler & Zunshine, APC (619.233.7078) for plaintiff and moving party; No other appearances.

The issue of service is discussed. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Flexground, LLC's application for right to attach order is denied without prejudice to being refiled with proper notice. Plaintiff has not shown that it served OBS with the amended notice of hearing nor has 30 days elapsed since the March 18, 2026 service of the summons and complaint. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/HEK)
